title: theriophonum dalzellii
intro: Theriophonum dalzellii, also known as the Thalikulam plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae, native to the Western Ghats in India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Theriophonum dalzellii include its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, can be made by boiling the roots and leaves in water to extract its medicinal compounds.
